mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ADMIN_USERS ( admin_id, login_id, password, department, admin_pw, name, admin_role ) VALUES ( SEQ_ADMIN_USERS.NEXTVAL, #{login_id}, #{password}, #{department}, #{admin_pw}, #{name}, #{admin_role} )
mapper.update: UPDATE ADMIN_USERS SET password = #{password} where admin_id = #{admin_id}
UPDATE ADMIN_USERS SET admin_pw = #{admin_pw} where admin_id = #{admin_id}
